title: Create Aeronautics: Assembly Line
description: (UNFINISHED) Adds various tool for aeronautics including automatable block assemblers.
body:
This is an addon for Create: Aeronautics which will add several helpful blocks and items.

UPDATE: Warp drive now stores inputted data and defaults fields to 0.

THIS PROJECT IS STILL IN DEVELOPMENT

And as such, block models/textures and the mod icon are not final and will likely be improved in the future

----Current Additions----

Block Assembler (beta): Assembles a single block when powered and clicked with a block or deplyer.

Warp drive (beta): Allows for teleporting the ship. Must input all vectors, even if it is 0.

PLANNED ADDITIONS

-Ship Disassembler

-Newton's Rod (Name pending, would be like a assembly/disassembly tool in hand)

-Ship in a Bottle (Ship Storage)

-Repulsion Field

-Reactor
